MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiffs Norma Robinson, a Successor in interest to Patrick E. Durkin, Deceased, and Patrick J. Durkin and Kelly Durkin as the Legal Heirs of Patrick E. Durkin, Deceased.
Plaintiff Norma Robinson present via Court Call, Patrick J. Durkin present in pro per.
Parties were sworn and testified.

After hearing the testimony and considered the evidence both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, the Court ordered for distribution of all net settlements funds derived from the personal injury - survival and wrongful death cause of action as following proportions:
Norma Robinson 33 1/3%.
Patrick J. Durkin 33 1/3%.
Kelly Durkin 33 1/3%.
Attorneys' Fee and Costs $1,487.80
Order was submitted to and signed by the Court. (See scanned doc. for the details of Order)
